title: rubus × callianthus
intro: Rubus × callianthus, also known as the fragrant raspberry or raspberry rose, is a hybrid plant derived from the cross between Rubus idaeus and Rubus fruticosus. This plant contains anthocyanins, which give it its medicinal properties and are also responsible for its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Rubus × callianthus include its potential to help reduce the risk of chronic diseases such as heart disease, cancer, and cognitive decline, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues and alleviate pain. Rubus × callianthus can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties for therapeutic purposes.
